vocab.meaning: mô-men xoắn không đối thủ (sức kéo cực mạnh)
vocab.example: I am particularly drawn to electric sports cars because they deliver unrivaled torque almost instantaneously.

vocab.meaning: chất lượng hoàn thiện chắc chắn, bền bỉ
vocab.example: I prefer SUVs with a rugged build quality that can withstand the wear and tear of long-distance mountain expeditions.
A car equipped with a panoramic sunroof is a must-have for me, as it makes the cabin feel much more airy and expansive.

vocab.meaning: sự thanh lịch không phô trương
vocab.example: I have a soft spot for Swedish car brands because they represent unostentatious elegance rather than flashy luxury.

vocab.meaning: hệ thống phanh tái tạo năng lượng
vocab.example: Modern hybrids with a sophisticated regenerative braking system fascinate me from an engineering perspective.

vocab.meaning: khả năng điều khiển mẫu mực (rất nhạy và chính xác)
vocab.example: For city driving, I lean towards hot hatches that offer exemplary handling and can zip through tight corners effortlessly.

vocab.meaning: cách bố trí ghế ngồi linh hoạt (có thể tháo rời/thay đổi)
vocab.example: As someone who travels with a lot of gear, a modular seating arrangement is the most critical factor in my choice of vehicle.

vocab.meaning: sự kết hợp giữa cổ điển và hiện đại
vocab.example: I’m a huge fan of cars that strike a perfect balance of retro-modern fusion, combining 60s silhouettes with current technology.

vocab.meaning: khả năng cách âm vượt trội
vocab.example: I value superior sound insulation above all else, as I enjoy a tranquil environment to listen to podcasts while commuting.

vocab.meaning: sự chế tác thủ công theo yêu cầu
vocab.example: There’s something incredibly alluring about high-end grand tourers that feature bespoke craftsmanship in every interior detail.
